Video.summary: A private pre-season event held in a secret warehouse in Budapest, Hungary, the inaugural Karate Combat: Genesis event took place on February 3, 2018. The event showcases the incredible depth of the fight roster highlighting many karate legends in various weight classes, competing for the first time ever in this new sporting league.
Video.grandparentTitle: KARATE COMBAT: GENESIS - Abdou Lahad Cisse vs. Aykut Usda
Video.title: KARATE COMBAT: GENESIS - Abdou Lahad Cisse vs. Aykut Usda

Image.alt: KARATE COMBAT: GENESIS - Abdou Lahad Cisse vs. Aykut Usda

KARATE COMBAT: GENESIS - Abdou Lahad Cisse vs. Aykut Usda

Video.summary: Out of the Cage reveals the private thoughts and emotions of a fight sport athlete, the ambition that drives them and how they are affected when encountering defeat or facing triumph. Featuring Addy Pallit.
Video.grandparentTitle: Out of the Cage - Addy Pallit
Video.title: Out of the Cage - Addy Pallit

Image.alt: Out of the Cage - Addy Pallit
Out of the Cage - Addy Pallit
Out of the Cage - Addy Pallit

Video.summary: Every athlete has their own unique way to be the best. We focus on the details of their training and why they think they have been successful. Gain insight on the featured athlete from their coaches and training partners - as well as the athlete themselves - about preparing for their sport. What do they bring to the sport as individuals - and what do they gain by being at the top of their game? Featuring John Woo
Video.grandparentTitle: Fighter Profile: John Woo
Video.title: Fighter Profile: John Woo

Image.alt: Fighter Profile: John Woo
Fighter Profile: John Woo
Fighter Profile: John Woo

Video.summary: The School of Hard Knocks 22 filmed at the Century Casino in Calgary. Professional and Amateur fighters from across North America battle it out in the cage. Zach Manywounds vs. Andrew Vandervelden; Jeff Porter vs. Dan Walders; Dia Grant vs. Michael Karkula; Corey Atkinson vs. Denny Heathen.

Video.summary: Live from Athens, Greece on July 28, 2018, Karate Combat: Olympus is the second event of the Karate Combat fighting league's inaugural season. Held in the ancient Zappeion Courtyard where the first modern Olympic Games took place in 1896. On the Main Card: “Hurricane” Davy Dona of France versus Jerome “The Brown Bear” from the UK. The co-main event features Morocco’s Achraf Ouchen versus Ecuadorian Franklin Mina. Other fighters include Deivis Ferraras of Dominican Republic, Wellington Barbosa of Brazil, and Yaser Sahintekin of Turkey.
Video.grandparentTitle: KARATE COMBAT: OLYMPUS
Video.title: KARATE COMBAT: OLYMPUS

Image.alt: KARATE COMBAT: OLYMPUS
KARATE COMBAT: OLYMPUS
KARATE COMBAT: OLYMPUS
